feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,372Chapters: 59/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,074Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 77

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: can't hide from the family line
entry.summary:
Author: froachy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,870Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 43

Summary: When Arthur finds out about Gwaine and Percival's relationship, he exiles them. Merlin won't accept that his man crush hates gay people. All he wants is a place for people to exist freely - Arthur doesn't believe he can make it. Angst ensues.

entry.summary:
Author: FallingLeaf1298

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,780Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: They found it there, in the woods. It was able to change destiny and fate itself. The interwoven golden strands becoming a more complicated web from the moment that they found it.

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 451,242Chapters: 94/100Kudos: 565

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.summary:
Author: naufragio_lunar

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,459Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 36

entry.title: The Grey
entry.summary:
Author: diadoumenos

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,607Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 353

Summary: It was then that Merlin heard a Laugh. Chills prickled down his spine, and his heart stopped. It actually stopped in his chest – or skipped a beat... or five – because he felt it stutter back to life and pound like charging horses at the sound, because he knew that laugh. He knew it like he knew the gentle squeeze of Gaius’s hand on his shoulder, the loving press of his mother’s lips to his brow, and the ever-present whisper of magic along his fingertips. The sun disappeared the day Arthur died, exactly four months ago, and never returned. They called it: The Grey. A tale of loss, supernatural meddling, time travel, hidden identities, crazy twists, and love. (Not Season 5 compliant.)

  • Major Character Death

entry.summary:

entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,762Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

entry.title: An Impractical Wager
entry.summary:
Author: theletters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,767Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 27

Summary: “After everything—an entire day of purposefully trying to tick him off—this was what Arthur was getting angry over?” Merlin meets How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days. When Gwaine implies Merlin has it easy working for Arthur, Merlin sets out to prove him wrong, job security be damned. But no matter how hard he tries, Arthur won’t fire him—and when he breaks, it’s for a reason Merlin could never have expected.

entry.title: Two sides of the same coin
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,358Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Arthur was born of magic. Merlin was born magic. Merlin was born because of Arthur. Merlin was born FOR Arthur. Everything he'd ever done and will do, was and will be for Arthur. Always.   What happens when Arthur starts to appreciate Merlin and his efforts? What happens, when their emotions run wild and they won't be able to hold them back anymore? What happens when Merlin and Arthur finally give in to their desires and accept their true destiny: to be two sides of the same coin?

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,080Chapters: 11/55Kudos: 73

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,892Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?Season 2 of The Bond Series (I have fixed and reposted Season 1- I suggest you read that first, or this season won't make much sense). Note, you'll see each "book" in this season titled as an episode- make's it easier to follow the timeline, I think. For those who wished for less Merlin Whump and more Arthur- I have failed you, deeply :( I did make efforts to respect the "I wish Merlin was conscious more" requests!

entry.title: Redo
entry.summary:
Author: Escapeofreality_02

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,095Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Something happens during the final battle between Merlin and Morgana. Arthur and Merlin wake up at the begining, before they even met. After everything they've been through, they deserve their happy ending and no one was going to mess that up for them.

entry.title: Forbidden
entry.summary:
Author: Ahgase2002

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,456Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 153

Summary: "Your manservant is quite devoted" Mithian observed, following his gaze. Arthur snapped his attention back to her. "Merlin? He's adequate. When he's not being impossibly clumsy or insolent." "Strange. I've heard others speak of him with great admiration. They say he's fiercely loyal, I even heard that he's saved your life on multiple occasions." "He exaggerates his own importance." Mithian tilted her head, studying him. "You watch him quite frequently." Prince Arthur is in love with his manservant.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: So what did we miss?
entry.summary:
Author: TheRealSteve

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,465Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Arthur's new(ish) in town and Merlin's new(er).Arthur's really trying at this whole community thing, but somehow still causing problems.All Merlin does is make an entrance, meet a baker, and watch a marriage break down.And then report the drama back to Gaius and Geoffrey. Obviously.
